sourceTitle: Guidance on Generative AI - Graduate Research - Monash University
evidenceSnippetOriginal: To preserve the confidentiality of thesis examination, examiners are not permitted to use Generative AI technologies (such as ChatGPT) during the thesis examination process to support, prepare or write their examiners' report.
evidenceLocator: Graduate Research GenAI guidance page, Thesis Examination section
